comparison_base_assumption: c0adf5c was used as the comparison base because it is the branch point immediately before the SSW-DFH-001 implementer and tester commits in this worktree history.
documentation_decision: No product documentation changes were needed because the existing Tactical Operations Manual already states that further drive hits at zero ADF and hits on systems a ship lacks or systems already destroyed by damage are treated as hull hits; it also states combat control and damage control hits are not cumulative and second fires are hull damage.

commands_run.output_summary: Reviewed Implementer and Tester diff surface.
Confirmed standard non-Disastrous Fire fallback implementation.
Confirmed focused regression coverage for SSW-DFH-001 acceptance criteria.
